info.name: HubSpot CRM Lists API
info.description:
The Lists API allows you to create and manage lists of CRM records based on static membership or dynamic filter criteria. Lists can be used to segment contacts, companies, and other CRM objects for marketing and sales operations.

Contact Support:
 Name: HubSpot Developer Support

item.name: Hubspot Add Members to a List

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the static list to add members to.

request.description: Adds records to a static CRM list by their record IDs. This operation is only available for static lists. Records added will remain members until explicitly removed.

response.name: Members added successfully.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Hubspot Remove Members From a List

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the static list to remove members from.

request.description: Removes records from a static CRM list by their record IDs. This operation is only available for static lists. The records themselves will not be deleted, only removed from the list.

response.name: Members removed successfully.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: The request is invalid or missing required parameters.

request.description: Returns the records that are members of a specific CRM list. For static lists, returns manually added members. For dynamic lists, returns records that currently match the list filters.

response.name: Successful response with list members.

request.description: Permanently deletes a CRM list by its ID. This removes the list definition but does not delete the CRM records that were members of the list.

response.name: List deleted successfully.

The object type ID to filter lists by (e.g., 0-1 for contacts).
Filter by list type - STATIC or DYNAMIC.

request.description: Returns a page of all CRM lists in the portal. Lists can be either static (manually managed membership) or dynamic (filter-based membership). Use the limit and after parameters to paginate results.

response.name: Successful response with a list of CRM lists.

request.description: Creates a new CRM list. You can create either a static list with manually managed membership or a dynamic list with filter-based membership that updates automatically as records match the criteria.

response.name: List created successfully.
